# Recurring invoice → invoice associations

**Problem.** Invoices generated by a recurring invoice config have no reliable
back-link to the config that produced them. The config stores a single
`parentInvoiceId` (the *first* invoice it ever generated) at
[`execute-schedule.transaction.script.ts:64-68`](../../backend/src/recurring-invoices/domain/transaction-scripts/execute-schedule-TS/execute-schedule.transaction.script.ts);
every subsequent generated invoice is orphaned. As a result there is no way to
"see all invoices associated to a recurring invoice config."

This is a data-model bug, not just a missing screen.

## Decisions (locked)

- **Link type:** numeric `recurring_invoices.id` stored on the invoice. The
  human id (`REC-…`) is display-only.
- **History:** going-forward only. No backfill of existing invoices.
- **First deliverable:** Spec 0 (foundation) + Spec 1 (invoices on config
  detail page), shipped together. Specs 2 and 3 are independent follow-ups.

## Specs

| # | Spec | Depends on | Status |
|---|------|-----------|--------|
| 0 | [Foundation: link generated invoices to their config](./spec-0-foundation.md) | — | Not started |
| 1 | [Invoices on the recurring-config detail page](./spec-1-config-detail-invoices.md) | Spec 0 | Not started |
| 2 | [Config link on the invoice detail page](./spec-2-invoice-detail-config-link.md) | Spec 0 | Not started |
| 3 | [Filter the main invoices list by config](./spec-3-invoices-list-filter.md) | Spec 0 | Not started |

## Shared notes

- **Auth model.** A user only sees invoices where they are issuer or debtor.
  Config-scoped views additionally require config ownership (`issuerUserId`).
- **Link everywhere** is the numeric `recurring_invoices.id`; `REC-…` is
  display-only.
- **Tests** follow the existing `*.spec.ts` convention within each module.

## Tech stack

- Backend: NestJS + TypeORM + SQLite (action → transaction-script → repository).
- Frontend: React + Vite + Material-UI + Axios/React Query.
